) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]

FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT 1

FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]

) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]

FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[AppointmentId], [c].[ChiefComplaint], [c].[ConsultationDate], [c].[ConsultationFee], [c].[ConsultationType], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Diagnosis], [c].[DoctorId], [c].[Examination], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Notes], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[PatientId], [c].[Symptoms], [c].[TreatmentPlan], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [p].[ConsultationId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DoctorId], [a].[IsActive], [a].[Notes], [a].[OrganizationId], [a].[PatientId], [a].[Status], [a].[TokenNumber], [a].[Type], [a].[UpdatedAt], [a].[AppointmentDate]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c0].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[FirstName], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LastName], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[Phone], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p0]
) AS [p1] ON [c0].[PatientId] = [p1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c0].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p2].[Id], [p2].[ContainerSize], [p2].[CreatedAt], [p2].[DispensedQuantity], [p2].[DispensingForm], [p2].[Dosage], [p2].[Duration], [p2].[Frequency], [p2].[Instructions], [p2].[IsActive], [p2].[MedicineId], [p2].[MedicineName], [p2].[OrganizationId], [p2].[PrescriptionId], [p2].[Quantity], [p2].[Timing], [p2].[TotalPrice], [p2].[UnitPrice], [p2].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [PrescriptionItems] AS [p2]
) AS [p3] ON [p].[Id] = [p3].[PrescriptionId]
WHERE [p].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__8__locals1_request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [p].[IssuedDate] >= @__startDateTime_2 AND [p].[IssuedDate] <= @__endDateTime_3
ORDER BY [p].[IssuedDate] DESC, [p].[CreatedAt] DESC, [p].[Id], [c0].[Id], [a0].[Id], [p1].[Id], [u0].[Id], [d0].[Id], [u2].[Id]

) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]

SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[AppointmentId], [c].[ChiefComplaint], [c].[ConsultationDate], [c].[ConsultationFee], [c].[ConsultationType], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[Diagnosis], [c].[DoctorId], [c].[Examination], [c].[IsActive], [c].[Notes], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[PatientId], [c].[Symptoms], [c].[TreatmentPlan], [c].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[Id], [p0].[Address], [p0].[BloodGroup], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[DateOfBirth], [p0].[EmergencyContact], [p0].[FirstName], [p0].[Gender], [p0].[IsActive], [p0].[LastName], [p0].[MedicalHistory], [p0].[OrganizationId], [p0].[PatientCode], [p0].[Phone], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [p0].[UserId], [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt], [d0].[Id], [d0].[BaseClinicId], [d0].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d0].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d0].[CreatedAt], [d0].[ExperienceYears], [d0].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d0].[FollowupFeeTele], [d0].[IsActive], [d0].[OrganizationId], [d0].[Qualification], [d0].[RegistrationNumber], [d0].[Specialization], [d0].[UpdatedAt], [d0].[UserId], [u2].[Id], [u2].[CreatedAt], [u2].[Email], [u2].[FirstName], [u2].[IsActive], [u2].[LastName], [u2].[OrganizationId], [u2].[PasswordHash], [u2].[Phone], [u2].[RefreshToken], [u2].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u2].[Role], [u2].[SelectedClinicId], [u2].[UpdatedAt], [a0].[Id], [p2].[Id], [p2].[ConsultationId], [p2].[CreatedAt], [p2].[InternalNotes], [p2].[IsActive], [p2].[IssuedDate], [p2].[OrganizationId], [p2].[PatientInstructions], [p2].[PrescriptionNumber], [p2].[Status], [p2].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4
ORDER BY [c].[ConsultationDate] DESC, [c].[CreatedAt] DESC, [c].[Id], [a0].[Id], [p0].[Id], [u0].[Id], [d0].[Id], [u2].[Id]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [a].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Address], [c].[Code], [c].[ContactEmail], [c].[ContactPhone], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[EveningEndTime], [c].[EveningStartTime], [c].[FullDayEndTime], [c].[FullDayStartTime], [c].[IsActive], [c].[MorningEndTime], [c].[MorningStartTime], [c].[Name], [c].[OperatingHoursType], [c].[OrganizationId], [c].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [a].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[AppointmentId], [c1].[ChiefComplaint], [c1].[ConsultationDate], [c1].[ConsultationFee], [c1].[ConsultationType], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[Diagnosis], [c1].[DoctorId], [c1].[Examination], [c1].[IsActive], [c1].[Notes], [c1].[OrganizationId], [c1].[PatientId], [c1].[Symptoms], [c1].[TreatmentPlan], [c1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Consultations] AS [c1]
) AS [c2] ON [a].[Id] = [c2].[AppointmentId]
WHERE [a].[Id] = @__request_Id_0

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[DoctorId], [u0].[FirstName] + N' ' + [u0].[LastName] AS [DoctorName], [d].[ClinicId], [c0].[Name] AS [ClinicName], [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime], [d].[EndTime], [d].[IsActive], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[UpdatedAt]
FROM [DoctorAvailabilities] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d0].[Id], [d0].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d0]
) AS [d1] ON [d].[DoctorId] = [d1].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [d1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Name]
    FROM [Clinics] AS [c]
) AS [c0] ON [d].[ClinicId] = [c0].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [d].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [d].[AvailableDate] >= @__request_StartDate_Value_2 AND [d].[AvailableDate] <= @__request_EndDate_Value_3
ORDER BY [d].[AvailableDate], [d].[StartTime]

FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[CreatedAt], [u0].[Email], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[OrganizationId], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[Phone], [u0].[RefreshToken], [u0].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u0].[Role], [u0].[SelectedClinicId], [u0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u0]
) AS [u1] ON [d].[UserId] = [u1].[Id]
WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [UserClinicAccess] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[UserId] = [d].[UserId] AND [u].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [u].[CanAccess] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [u].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit))

INNER JOIN (

INNER JOIN (

) AS [p3] ON [p].[Id] = [p3].[PrescriptionId]

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]

    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[PhotoUrl], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[ConsultationId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Description], [c0].[DisplayOrder], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[PhotoUrl], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [ConsultationPhotos] AS [c0]
) AS [c1] ON [c].[Id] = [c1].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[PhotoUrl], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[ConsultationId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Description], [c0].[DisplayOrder], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[PhotoUrl], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [ConsultationPhotos] AS [c0]
) AS [c1] ON [c].[Id] = [c1].[ConsultationId]

) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[PhotoUrl], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[ConsultationId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Description], [c0].[DisplayOrder], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[PhotoUrl], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [ConsultationPhotos] AS [c0]
) AS [c1] ON [c].[Id] = [c1].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4
ORDER BY [c].[ConsultationDate] DESC, [c].[CreatedAt] DESC, [c].[Id], [a0].[Id], [p0].[Id], [u0].[Id], [d0].[Id], [u2].[Id], [p2].[Id]

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]

    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]

) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]

    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[ConsultationId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Description], [c0].[DisplayOrder], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[PhotoUrl], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [ConsultationPhotos] AS [c0]
) AS [c1] ON [c].[Id] = [c1].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4

FROM [Consultations] AS [c]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[ClinicId]
    FROM [Appointments] AS [a]
) AS [a0] ON [c].[AppointmentId] = [a0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Address], [p].[BloodGroup], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[DateOfBirth], [p].[EmergencyContact], [p].[FirstName], [p].[Gender], [p].[IsActive], [p].[LastName], [p].[MedicalHistory], [p].[OrganizationId], [p].[PatientCode], [p].[Phone], [p].[PhotoUrl], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UserId]
    FROM [Patients] AS [p]
) AS [p0] ON [c].[PatientId] = [p0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastName], [u].[OrganizationId], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[Phone], [u].[RefreshToken], [u].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u].[Role], [u].[SelectedClinicId], [u].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
) AS [u0] ON [p0].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[BaseClinicId], [d].[ConsultationFeeInPerson], [d].[ConsultationFeeTele], [d].[CreatedAt], [d].[ExperienceYears], [d].[FollowupFeeInPerson], [d].[FollowupFeeTele], [d].[IsActive], [d].[OrganizationId], [d].[Qualification], [d].[RegistrationNumber], [d].[Specialization], [d].[UpdatedAt], [d].[UserId]
    FROM [DoctorProfiles] AS [d]
) AS [d0] ON [c].[DoctorId] = [d0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u1].[Id], [u1].[CreatedAt], [u1].[Email], [u1].[FirstName], [u1].[IsActive], [u1].[LastName], [u1].[OrganizationId], [u1].[PasswordHash], [u1].[Phone], [u1].[RefreshToken], [u1].[RefreshTokenExpiryTime], [u1].[Role], [u1].[SelectedClinicId], [u1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Users] AS [u1]
) AS [u2] ON [d0].[UserId] = [u2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[ConsultationId], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[InternalNotes], [p1].[IsActive], [p1].[IssuedDate], [p1].[OrganizationId], [p1].[PatientInstructions], [p1].[PrescriptionNumber], [p1].[Status], [p1].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Prescriptions] AS [p1]
) AS [p2] ON [c].[Id] = [p2].[ConsultationId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[ConsultationId], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[Description], [c0].[DisplayOrder], [c0].[IsActive], [c0].[OrganizationId], [c0].[PhotoUrl], [c0].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [ConsultationPhotos] AS [c0]
) AS [c1] ON [c].[Id] = [c1].[ConsultationId]
WHERE [c].[OrganizationId] = @__organizationId_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [a0].[ClinicId] = @__request_ClinicId_Value_1 AND [c].[DoctorId] = @__doctorProfile_Id_2 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] >= @__startDateTime_3 AND [c].[ConsultationDate] <= @__endDateTime_4
ORDER BY [c].[ConsultationDate] DESC, [c].[CreatedAt] DESC, [c].[Id], [a0].[Id], [p0].[Id], [u0].[Id], [d0].[Id], [u2].[Id], [p2].[Id]
